versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   dapr-dashboard-0-15-0           true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: dapr-dashboard
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: dapr-dashboard-0-15-0
      name: dapr-dashboard
      namespace: dapr-dashboard

examples.title: With Ingress
examples.installHtml:
helm upgrade --install traefik oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=traefik:39.0.5" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install dapr oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=dapr:1.16.9" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install dapr-dashboard oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=dapr-dashboard:0.15.0" \
  -n kcm-system
examples.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   traefik-39-0-5                  true
# kcm-system   dapr-1-16-9                     true
# kcm-system   dapr-dashboard-0-15-0           true
examples.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: dapr-dashboard
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: traefik-39-0-5
      name: traefik
      namespace: dapr-dashboard
      values: |
        traefik:
          deployment:
            kind: DaemonSet
          ports:
            web:
              port: 8000
              hostPort: 80
            websecure:
              port: 8443
              hostPort: 443
    - template: dapr-1-16-9
      name: dapr
      namespace: dapr-dashboard
    - template: dapr-dashboard-0-15-0
      name: dapr-dashboard
      namespace: dapr-dashboard
      values: |
        dapr-dashboard:
          ingress:
            enabled: true
            host: ''
